question.stem: A school media team is updating a content scheduler and wants to compare two interface designs objectively. Which approach is strongest?
choices: Define measurable criteria and run user tests on both designs
Choose the design with more colors
Pick whichever design was coded first
question.explanation: Measured evaluation supports evidence-based design decisions. A common wrong choice is "Choose the design with more colors" because it sounds plausible but does not address the core condition. Takeaway: identify the exact requirement before selecting an approach.
